narrative:
Windsor Township has 1,194 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
